# Load necessary libraries
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

# Load the data
```{r}
df <- read.csv("./results/model_evaluation_crossDate_corn_rev.csv")
```

# Making the "Correlation" Table

```{r}
df_corr <- df %>%
  group_by(crop, train_date, test_date) %>%
  summarise(mean_IoU = mean(IoU, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
print(df_corr)

correlation_tables <- df_corr %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = test_date, values_from = mean_IoU)

# Reorder columns after pivot
correlation_tables <- correlation_tables %>%
  select(crop, train_date, `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`)

for (cr in unique(df_corr$crop)) {
  cat("\nCorrelation Table for", cr, "\n")
  print(correlation_tables %>% filter(crop == cr) %>% select(-crop))
}

write.csv(correlation_tables, "./results/crossDate_corn_rev.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```

## ANOVA by train_date: IoU ~ test_date (cross-date files)

```{r}
# Find cross-date files for crops
cross_files <- list.files("./results", pattern = "model_evaluation_crossDate_.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
if (length(cross_files) == 0) message("No cross-date files found in ./results/")

for (f in cross_files) {
  dat <- read.csv(f, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  # infer crop name from file
  fname <- basename(f)
  crop_name <- sub("model_evaluation_crossDate_(.*)\\.csv$", "\\1", fname)

  # ensure columns exist
  if (!all(c("train_date", "test_date", "IoU") %in% colnames(dat))) {
    message("Skipping ", fname, ": missing required columns")
    next
  }

  train_dates <- sort(unique(dat$train_date))
  for (td in train_dates) {
    df_td <- dat %>% filter(train_date == td)
    if (nrow(df_td) == 0) next

    df_td <- df_td %>% mutate(test_date = as.factor(test_date))
    out_prefix <- paste0("./results/anova_crossDate_", crop_name, "_train", td)

    # check number of test_date levels
    n_levels <- nlevels(df_td$test_date)
    if (n_levels < 2) {
      writeLines(paste("Only", n_levels, "test_date level for", crop_name, "train", td), con = paste0(out_prefix, "_note.txt"))
      next
    }

    fit <- tryCatch(aov(IoU ~ test_date, data = df_td), error = function(e) e)
    if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
      writeLines(paste("ANOVA error for", crop_name, "train", td, ":", fit$message), con = paste0(out_prefix, "_error.txt"))
      next
    }

    aov_sum <- summary(fit)[[1]]
    aov_df <- as.data.frame(aov_sum)
    aov_df <- tibble::rownames_to_column(aov_df, var = "Term")
    write.csv(aov_df, paste0(out_prefix, "_table.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

    # save human-readable summary
    sink(paste0(out_prefix, "_summary.txt"))
    cat("ANOVA IoU ~ test_date for crop:", crop_name, "train_date:", td, "\n\n")
    print(summary(fit))
    sink()

    # Tukey HSD post-hoc
    if (n_levels > 1) {
      tuk <- tryCatch(TukeyHSD(fit, "test_date"), error = function(e) e)
      if (!inherits(tuk, "error")) {
        tuk_df <- as.data.frame(tuk$test_date)
        tuk_df <- tibble::rownames_to_column(tuk_df, var = "Comparison")
        write.csv(tuk_df, paste0(out_prefix, "_tukey.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
      } else {
        writeLines(paste("Tukey error:", tuk$message), con = paste0(out_prefix, "_tukey_error.txt"))
      }
    }
  }
}
```
